title: How to Upscale Images in ComfyUI (Ep05)
description:
How to Upscale Images in ComfyUI (Ep05) - best upscaling workflows (free + paid), model setup, VRAM tips, and clean 4K results.

In this episode, you’ll learn multiple ways to upscale images in ComfyUI. I walk through 7 ready-to-use upscale workflows (from simple resize → neural upscalers → diffusion tiled upscaling → Flux workflows → Seed VR 2 → paid 4K/API upscalers), and explain when to use each one depending on quality, speed, and VRAM.

What you’ll be able to do after this tutorial:
- Update ComfyUI (Easy Installer) and install the nodes used in this episode
- Import the Episode 05 workflow pack and run each upscale workflow
- Compare non-AI resize vs. neural upscalers vs. diffusion upscaling
- Install and test different PTH upscaler models (2x / 4x / 8x)
- Control final size using Scale By and model multipliers
- Use Tiled Diffusion + tiled VAE decode to avoid VRAM crashes
- Upscale with Fluxmania (Nunchaku) and tune denoise properly
- Use Seed VR 2 upscalers (model choices, reso
